contents:
[package]
description = "UI components for building fantastic desktop application by using GPUI."
keywords = ["desktop", "gpui", "shadcn", "ui", "uikit"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
name = "gpui-component"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/gpui-component"
homepage = "https://longbridge.github.io/gpui-component"
repository = "https://github.com/longbridge/gpui-component"
readme = "../../README.md"
version = "0.5.1"
publish = true
edition = "2024"

[lib]
doctest = false

[features]
decimal = ["dep:rust_decimal"]
inspector = ["gpui-macros/inspector", "gpui/inspector", "wry/devtools"]
webview = ["dep:wry"]
tree-sitter-languages = ["dep:tree-sitter-bash", "dep:tree-sitter-c", "dep:tree-sitter-c-sharp", "dep:tree-sitter-cmake", "dep:tree-sitter-cpp", "dep:tree-sitter-css", "dep:tree-sitter-diff", "dep:tree-sitter-elixir", "dep:tree-sitter-embedded-template", "dep:tree-sitter-go", "dep:tree-sitter-graphql", "dep:tree-sitter-html", "dep:tree-sitter-java", "dep:tree-sitter-javascript", "dep:tree-sitter-jsdoc", "dep:tree-sitter-make", "dep:tree-sitter-md", "dep:tree-sitter-proto", "dep:tree-sitter-python", "dep:tree-sitter-ruby", "dep:tree-sitter-rust", "dep:tree-sitter-scala", "dep:tree-sitter-sequel", "dep:tree-sitter-swift", "dep:tree-sitter-toml-ng", "dep:tree-sitter-typescript", "dep:tree-sitter-yaml", "dep:tree-sitter-zig"]

[dependencies]
anyhow = "1"
gpui = "0.2.2"
gpui-macros = "0.2.2"
notify = "7.0.0"
rust-i18n = "3"
schemars = "1"
serde_json = "1"
serde_repr = "0.1"
smallvec = "1"
smol = "2"
tracing = "0.1.41"
enum-iterator = "2.1.0"
itertools = "0.13.0"
once_cell = "1.19.0"
paste = "1"
regex = "1"
unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
uuid = "1.10"
num-traits = "0.2"
markdown = "1.0.0"
html5ever = "0.27"
markup5ever_rcdom = "0.3.0"
chrono = "0.4.38"
aho-corasick = "1.1.3"
tree-sitter = "0.25.4"
tree-sitter-json = "0.24.8"

[dependencies.gpui-component-macros]
path = "crates/macros"
version = "0.5.1"

[dependencies.ropey]
version = "=2.0.0-beta.1"
features = ["metric_lines_lf", "metric_utf16"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.219"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.sum-tree]
version = "0.2.0"
package = "zed-sum-tree"

[dependencies.wry]
version = "0.53.3"
package = "lb-wry"
optional = true

[dependencies.rust_decimal]
version = "1.37.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.lsp-types]
version = "0.97.0"
features = ["proposed"]

[dependencies.tree-sitter-bash]
version = "0.23.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-c]
version = "0.24.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-c-sharp]
version = "0.23.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-cmake]
version = "0.7.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-cpp]
version = "0.23.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-css]
version = "0.23.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-diff]
version = "0.1.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-elixir]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-embedded-template]
version = "0.23.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-go]
version = "0.23.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-graphql]
version = "0.1.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-html]
version = "0.23.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-java]
version = "0.23.5"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-javascript]
version = "0.23.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-jsdoc]
version = "0.23.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-make]
version = "1.1.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-md]
version = "0.5.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-proto]
version = "0.2.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-python]
version = "0.23.6"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-ruby]
version = "0.23.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-rust]
version = "0.24.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-scala]
version = "0.23.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-sequel]
version = "0.3.8"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-swift]
version = "0.7.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-toml-ng]
version = "0.7.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-typescript]
version = "0.23.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-yaml]
version = "0.7.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.tree-sitter-zig]
version = "1.1.2"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies]
core-text = "=21.0.0"

[dev-dependencies]
indoc = "2"

[dev-dependencies.gpui]
features = ["test-support"]
version = "0.2.2"

[lints.clippy]
almost_complete_range = "allow"
arc_with_non_send_sync = "allow"
borrowed_box = "allow"
dbg_macro = "deny"
let_underscore_future = "allow"
manual_is_multiple_of = "allow"
map_entry = "allow"
module_inception = "allow"
non_canonical_partial_ord_impl = "allow"
reversed_empty_ranges = "allow"
single_range_in_vec_init = "allow"
todo = "deny"
type_complexity = "allow"

[lints.clippy.style]
level = "allow"
priority = -1

[package]
name = "gpui-component-macros"
description = "Macros for GPUI Component."
version = "0.5.1"
license = "Apache-2.0"
publish = true
edition = "2024"

[package.metadata.cargo-machete]
ignored = ["proc-macro2", "core-text"]

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[lints.clippy]
almost_complete_range = "allow"
arc_with_non_send_sync = "allow"
borrowed_box = "allow"
dbg_macro = "deny"
let_underscore_future = "allow"
manual_is_multiple_of = "allow"
map_entry = "allow"
module_inception = "allow"
non_canonical_partial_ord_impl = "allow"
reversed_empty_ranges = "allow"
single_range_in_vec_init = "allow"
todo = "deny"
type_complexity = "allow"

[lints.clippy.style]
level = "allow"
priority = -1

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1.0"
quote = "1.0"
syn = "2.0"
